productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Formal Shoe
description: Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a classic design from red tape. The tapered toe box is designed for comfort and looks great when teamed with chinos or pants and shirts for a casual look.Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Lightly embossed horizontal grooves on the forefoot for greater style Tapered toe box for greater style Lace-ups for snug Fit Leather lined collar and tongue for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with elevated triangular pattern for better grip Slightly elevated heel for better posture and height shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
